center.name: 安卡什大区
center.summary: 安卡什大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括Peruvian plantcutter、灰白小霸鹟、Pied-crested tit-tyrant等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: peruviana: Andes of western and southern Peru from Ancash to Arequipa and Puno departments, and into Bolivia as far as La Paz Department The Andean tit-spinetail generally inhabits semi-arid to arid montane scrublands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Peru primarily in Arequipa and Puno departments and very rarely as far north as Ancash Department.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: saturata is found in the western Andes of central Peru between the departments of Ancash and Pasco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: neglecta is the northernmost; it is found in the northwestern Peruvian departments of La Libertad and Ancash

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: paytae is the northernmost; it is found in the northwest between the departments of Tumbes and Ancash

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in parts of four departments: southern Amazonas, southeastern Cajamarca, eastern La Libertad and northern Ancash

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a fairly narrow band from at least Peru's Department of Ancash south to Chile's Atacama Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: taczanowskii: Andes of northern and central Peru from southern Amazonas and Cajamarca departments south to Ancash and Junín departments The many-striped canastero inhabits the ecotone between timberline and páramo grasslands, a landscape characterized by rock outcrops, scattered shrubs, Espeletia, and groves of Polylepis trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Peruvian plantcutter is found in coastal northern Peru from Tumbes Department south to Ancash Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Peru from Ancash Department south to Ica and western Ayacucho departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Piura chat-tyrant is found in northern Peru on the western slope of the Andes from southeastern Piura Department south to central Ancash Department. One record in Lima Department suggests its range may extend further south than thought.{{cite journal |last=Baumann |first=M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous flycatcher is found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department to Ancash Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliaris is the northernmost; it occurs in the western Peruvian departments of Ancash and Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Peru from La Libertad and Ancash departments south to the departments of Huancavelica and Ayacucho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in the Cordillera Blanca of Peru's Department of Ancash and adjacent Department of Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-fronted ground tyrant is found in the Andes from the Department of Ancash in north-central Peru south through the extreme northern tip of Chile into western Bolivia's La Paz Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: huancabambae is found in the Andes of northern Peru from Piura and Cajamarca departments south to Ancash and Huánuco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Peru it is found in the northwest between Tumbes and Ancash departments
